scope: Public route-planning summary only. Fresh visible CloakBrowser evidence is required for any final publisher PDF verdict.
evidence_boundary: No browser verification, entitlement, institution-specific observations, screenshots, local paths, or article-level evidence are stored here.

acs.note: Use one visible-browser DOI prewarm before a batch.

wiley.note: Public route template is available; entitlement still requires current browser evidence.

ieee.note: Prewarm one DOI in the visible browser before batching.

springer.note: SpringerLink and Nature-family route variants are handled by one canonical publisher key.

elsevier.note: Try OA/API routes first and prewarm the visible browser for remaining rows.

geoscienceworld.note: Check current access with one DOI before any larger run.

onepetro.note: Avoid bulk runs until one visible-browser DOI completes.

iop.note: Public route template is available; this is not an entitlement verdict.

science.note: Public route template is available; this is not an entitlement verdict.

aps.note: A reusable closed-access route is not part of this public preview.
